seoTitle: Bejoording vs Belhus — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bejoording and Belhus. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bejoording and Belhus.
heading: Bejoording vs Belhus — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bejoording, Western Australia and Belhus, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Belhus has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Bejoording (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bejoording or Belhus safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bejoording has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Belhus scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bejoording scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Belhus scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bejoording or Belhus?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Belhus has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
